Convites.title: Invitations
Convites.subtitle: Invite investors by email. Registration requires an invitation.

Aceitar.title: Create your account
Aceitar.subtitle: Set your password to complete registration.
Aceitar.name: Name
Aceitar.acceptTerms: I accept the terms, and acknowledge the risk and illiquidity of the investment.
Aceitar.invalidBody: This invitation does not exist, has already been used, or has expired. Please contact TILWENI for a new invitation.

errors.terms: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.weak_password: The password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.invalid: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Mfa.title: Two-step verification
Mfa.enrollHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password) and enter the 6-digit code.
Mfa.challengeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

Kyc.title: Identity verification
Kyc.intro: To access the projects, we need to verify your identity.
Kyc.consent: I authorise the processing of my documents for identity verification (KYC) purposes, under the privacy policy.
Kyc.consentRequired: You must give consent to continue.
Kyc.submitError: Could not submit. Check the details and try again.
Kyc.pending: Your documents are under review. We will notify you once verification is complete.
Kyc.rejectedRetry: Your previous verification was not accepted. Please resubmit your documents.

Catalog.title: Project catalogue
Catalog.empty: There are currently no projects available for subscription.

ProjectDetail.noPosition: You have not subscribed to this project yet.
ProjectDetail.riskNotice: Investing involves the risk of total loss of capital, is illiquid and carries no guarantee of return. Figures shown are estimates.

ProjectAdmin.title: Project management
ProjectAdmin.name: Name
ProjectAdmin.empty: No projects. Create the first one.

Subscription.consent: I declare I have been informed and understand that this investment has no guaranteed capital, may result in the total or partial loss of the amount invested, is illiquid, and that the returns shown are estimates and not a guarantee of return.
Subscription.consentRequired: You must accept the declaration to continue.
Subscription.submitError: Could not register. Check the details and try again.
Subscription.belowMin: The amount is below the required minimum.
Subscription.already: You already have an active subscription for this project.

WorksAdmin.title: Works management
WorksAdmin.mediaHint: Images (JPEG/PNG/WebP) up to 200 MB; MP4/MOV videos up to 200 MB.

Statements.title: Dedicated account statements
Statements.notice: Every statement consultation is recorded in the audit log.

StatementsAdmin.title: Statements
StatementsAdmin.newVersionHint: Publishing the same period creates a new version; history is permanent.

Dashboard.title: My area
Dashboard.noPositions: You have no positions yet. Take a look at the available projects.
Dashboard.riskNotice: Investing involves the risk of total loss of capital, is illiquid and carries no guarantee of return. Figures shown are estimates.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.body_kyc_approved: Your identity has been verified. You can now access the projects.
Notifications.body_kyc_rejected: Your verification was not accepted. Please resubmit your documents.
Notifications.body_subscription_confirmed: Your funds for {projectName} have been confirmed.

AuditAdmin.title: Audit log
AuditAdmin.triggerNote: Rows written by a trigger carry no actor or IP — the record of the change comes from the database, without request context.

SettingsAdmin.title: Platform settings
SettingsAdmin.hint: The value is JSON: text in quotes, numbers unquoted, `null` for "no limit".

UsersAdmin.title: Users
UsersAdmin.name: Name
UsersAdmin.cannotDemoteSelf: You cannot remove your own administrator role.

ResetPassword.title: Recover access
ResetPassword.intro: Enter your email. If an account exists, we will send a link to set a new password.
ResetPassword.sent: If an account exists with this email, the link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
ResetPassword.error: Could not send. Please try again.

NewPassword.title: Set a new password
NewPassword.weak: The password must be at least 8 characters.
NewPassword.invalidLink: This link has expired or has already been used. Please request a new one.
NewPassword.error: Could not save. Please try again.
NewPassword.done: Password changed. You will need the code from your authenticator app to sign in.
